title: Environmental Designer
description:
Atelier Ten is an innovative multidisciplinary firm of building services engineers environmental design consultants, and lighting designers focused on delivering high-quality building services design and sustainable design consultancy within the built environment sector. We aim to deliver highly sustainable design solutions based on the touchstones of environmental integrity, economic viability, and pragmatic engineering solutions. These principles are embedded in our collaborative and creative approach to problem solving and efficient resource utilisation.

We seek to reduce complexity. A core objective is to meet the needs of our clients by developing well-integrated buildings with simple systems that work with natural laws of physics to provide comfort while reducing energy consumption and contributing back to the greater environment. At Atelier Ten, we take a wider role in the design process than traditional building services engineers and consultants: in particular we work with the design team to integrate environmental moderation and control into the fabric of the building. From this improved basis we develop efficient and well-integrated building services systems to provide comfortable and efficient internal environments.

Atelier Ten has a history of innovation. Founded in 1990, we are not afraid to challenge conventional thinking. Our environmental ethos is not an additive one; rather we strive to make buildings do more with less by working from basic principles and employing rigorous analysis. Our success is built on the expert delivery of innovative and sustainable engineering solutions.

To support Atelier Ten’s continued success. We have established, and continue to maintain, efficient and effective business knowledge and quality management systems in order to provide our clients - in both the private and public sector - with first-class services covering the full range of design, construction, building services, engineering and maintenance disciplines, and by providing first-class project development and management services including an award-winning design solutions consultancy service.

The post holder will be responsible for supporting work on a range of projects assisting the delivery of environmental and sustainability advice on projects for both internal clients and external clients. This will involve providing consultancy on environmental design, sustainability benchmarking/implementation, building energy optimisation, daylight & shading design, sustainable systems, materials and waste. This consultancy will be demonstrated through sound analytics including building physics.

Projects will range from masterplanning to detailed design of specific buildings across all scales and locations of the globe. Using industry benchmark and internal standards, the post holder will ensure not only the timely delivery of accurate project information but also provide a point of contact between engineering staff and the other members of the environmental team.

Key Accountabilities:

Technical ability

  • Coordinate, complete and ensure Green Rating projects in any given green rating scheme (Green Mark, LEED etc.)
  • Complete simulations such as energy modelling, CFD, daylighting etc.
  • Actively committed to pursuing CPD of all relevant disciplines
  • Demonstrate reasonable knowledge of environmental design, sustainability benchmarking/implementation, building energy optimisation, daylight & shading design, sustainable systems, materials, waste and building physics
  • Actively committed to developing specialist skills in one, or more, disciplines
  • Demonstrate an understanding of Atelier Ten’s approach
  • Able to provide accurate calculations and informative design options in relevant disciplines
  • Deliver technical solutions in accordance with client brief
  • Help facilitate the development of client brief by supporting other members of their team
  • Willingness to develop an awareness and understanding of other disciplines

Project management

  • Liaise with client, architect and other members of the internal or external design team
  • Can effectively co-ordinate with in-house engineers, the environmental teamand members of the graphics team
  • Can develop appropriate design, proposals or analysis within the agreed time scale
  • Maintain overview of project work and provide updates as and when required to line manager/project manager

Interpersonal Skills

  • Appreciates the need for effective liaison between Atelier Ten, clients and architects
  • Report any feedback or issues concerning the project from clients
  • Foster positive relationships within Atelier Ten

Requirements:

  • Sustainability, Engineering, Architectural or related disciplines
  • Bachelor’s or higher degree in a field related to environmental building design, architecture, building services engineering, and/ or building science
  • Fresh graduates are welcome to apply. We are seeking applicants with zero to three-years’ professional experience in a sustainability consulting practice or related design firm or within an engineering environment.
  • LEED AP in BD+C (plus point)
  • GMM/GMP (plus point)
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, AutoCAD, Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, InDesign), and Rhino is highly desired
  • In addition, skills with such software as Revit, “R,” Grasshopper, Ladybug/Honeybee, Radiance, eQuest, EnergyPlus, IES, D3, or general programming or data visualization skill would be of interest
  • Solid interest in environmental and energy-efficient design
  • Have undertaken a wide variety of project work
  • Practical knowledge of project work coupled with an understanding of project management tools
  • Understanding of the deliverables associated with projects within the public and private sector
  • Understanding of project co-ordination
  • Team player
  • Appreciates the need for the application of consistent standards and metrics

Skills

  • Good understanding on Green rating schemes such as Green Mark, LEED etc.
  • Manage ESD projects independently
  • Good understanding in simulations e.g. energy modelling, CFD, daylight & glare modelling.
  • Ability to work under limited supervision
  • Ability to prioritise work loads
  • Good writing skills for producing written reports
  • Effective IT skills for producing relevant material, including knowledge and application of building physics packages
  • Demonstrated graphic and verbal communication skills

Qualifications


Sustainability, Engineering, Architectural or related disciplines

postedCompany.description:
ATELIER TEN (ASIA) PTE. LTD.

As Environmental Design Consultants and Building Services Engineers we are committed to high- performance and sustainable design within the built environment. Our core objective is to meet the needs of our clients by developing well-integrated buildings with simple systems that work with natural laws of physics to increase well being, reduce energy consumption and contribute back to the greater environment.

As an International Consultancy, we provide a seamless, integrated service, marked by Accessibility, Reliability and Efficiency at every level. Founded in 1990 in London by a team of progressive engineers, we now have offices In Glasgow, Edinburgh, New York, New Haven, San Francisco, Doha, Bangkok, Singapore, Melbourne And Sydney.
